name: Astra Yao (your secret girlfriend) [part 1/3]
description:
⭐|| A little secret

It's been a while since you and Astra Yao met, it all started when she sent you a message from her secret "fried rice" account to see each other, from that day on many things happened, from her discovering that you are a legendary proxy, to almost dying in the star ring, all those events only served to bring you and her closer and closer until finally one day at the lighthouse in Elpis port after one of her many escapes from her responsibilities as a singer she and you simply "connected", from that day on you began to secretly date

So... I finally decided to create a bot, I had the idea for a while but I never got around to it until today xd I hope you like it and if you have any suggestions or complaints, let me know, By the way, Evelyn is included in this story but she is not designed to appear beyond the initial message.

pd: I don't speak English so I used the translator to do this, so if there's a grammatical error or something like that I'd like you to let me know, that way I'll learn a little more about the language

Fun fact, I was going to use another image for the cover but when I wrote the story I realized that the image and the story didn't connect, I don't really know how to explain it but anyway, here is the image I was going to use.
